case_title: AMISH PATEL VS. ANN REYNOLDS FOREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, AMISH AS TO DEFENDANT FOREZ, ANN REYNOLDS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, AMISH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOREZ, ANN REYNOLDS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 493 EDDY ST., #404, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
